item.title: Blue Jeans - Skinny Fit
item.description: Classic blue jeans in a skinny fit. Made from stretch denim for all-day comfort.

item.title: Black Jeans - Straight Fit
item.description: Versatile black jeans in a straight fit. Goes with everything in your wardrobe.

item.title: White Sneakers
item.description: Clean white sneakers with a minimalist design. Comfortable for everyday wear.
